/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ahfl_compiler_backends_registry_tests.dir/unit/compiler/backends/registry.cpp.o -o ahfl_compiler_backends_registry_tests  ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backends.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_smv.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_pipeline_observation.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_pipeline_persistence.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_pipeline_execution.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_pipeline_handoff.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_pipeline_common.a ../src/pipeline/persistence/libahfl_pipeline_persistence.a ../src/pipeline/observation/libahfl_pipeline_observation.a ../src/pipeline/execution/libahfl_pipeline_execution.a ../src/compiler/handoff/libahfl_compiler_handoff.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_assurance.a ../src/compiler/assurance/libahfl_compiler_assurance.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_summary.a ../src/compiler/ir/libahfl_compiler_ir.a ../src/compiler/semantics/libahfl_compiler_semantics.a ../src/compiler/syntax/frontend/libahfl_compiler_syntax.a ../src/compiler/syntax/parser/libahfl_compiler_syntax_parser.a ../third_party/antlr4/libantlr4_runtime.a -framework CoreFoundation ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_infra_wasm.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_infra_k8s_crd.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_infra_openapi_spec.a ../src/compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_infra_terraform_gen.a ../src/base/support/libahfl_base_support.a ../src/base/json/libahfl_base_json.a
